notes: No horizontal scroll or edge clipping at 375px; single quiet column holds at all three widths, including longer rows ('Sjakk-NM 2026 – eliteklassen' wraps to 3 lines but stays fully readable).
Fixture names read in full, neither side hidden: Norway – England, Argentina – Switzerland — no truncation.
Norwegian-channel contract holds: only Direktesport +1, Viaplay, TV 2 Play, Max +1, TV 2, NRK, HBO Max appear as 'where to watch' — no ESPN/FOX/Sky at any width.
Round labels (Kvartfinale, Semifinale, Damefinale, Herrefinale) show correctly next to knockout fixtures at all widths.
National flag emoji (Norway, Argentina, Switzerland, England) render as real flags, not broken-image boxes.

Must-see accent (left border + tinted wash) is selective, not universal: 5 of 7 events in 'I dag' are accented (Sjakk-NM, three golf majors with tracked Norwegian golfers, Norway–England) while Tour de France 2026 and Wimbledon Damefinale stay unaccented — ties to tracked favorites/importance rather than blanket-applied.
Header, 'Dine neste' tracked list, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger'/'Rediger' links, and footer (Oppdatert / Abonner i kalender / AI-budsjett) intact and aligned at every width.

Could not assess clearly: the icon on Casper Ruud / Wimbledon rows still reads as a magnifying glass rather than an obvious tennis pictograph at all three widths — same ambiguity noted in the prior review, not clipped or broken.
No event showed the honest empty '–' channel placeholder in this snapshot, so that path could not be exercised.
